subsection.heading: Board of Directors.—
subsection.content: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation or bylaws.

subsection.heading: Officers.—
subsection.content: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation or bylaws.

subsection.heading: Nondiscrimination.—
subsection.content: The requirements for holding office in the corporation may not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, or national origin.

text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: Oct. 30, 1984, Pub. L. 98–561, §§ 5 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office), 6, 7, 98 Stat. 2911.

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;

text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: 36:2905 (words after 3d comma related to discrimination in holding office).

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;

note.p: The words “in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:2906 and “in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:2907 are omitted as unnecessary.
